title: Thai Flatbread with Savory Filling
description: A flavorful and crispy Thai flatbread filled with a savory mix of herbs and spices. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Cut the flatbread into quarters and set aside.
In a bowl, mix together crushed Eastern Middle Eastern Fluffy Bread, 2 tablespoons of flour, and 1/4 cup of water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 2-3 minutes until it comes together.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the circles with sesame oil and sprinkle with soy sauce.
Place a quarter piece of flatbread on each circle and top with chopped cilantro and scallions.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the filling and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with sesame oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
